equipment.name: Barbell (No Bench)
equipment.description: Olympic bar with weight plates, floor work

exercises.name: Standard Push-Ups
exercises.cue: Chest to floor, squeeze at top. Keep core tight.

exercises.name: Diamond Push-Ups
exercises.cue: Hands form diamond under chest. Elbows close to body.

exercises.name: Wide Push-Ups
exercises.cue: Hands 1.5x shoulder width. Focus on chest stretch.

exercises.name: Pike Push-Ups
exercises.cue: Hips high, head down. Mimic overhead press pattern.

exercises.name: Decline Push-Ups
exercises.cue: Feet elevated on a surface. Targets upper chest.

exercises.name: Deep Push-Ups on Handles
exercises.cue: Go below handle level for extra ROM. Squeeze pecs hard.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Handle Push-Ups
exercises.cue: Handles close together, elbows tight to body.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Floor Press
exercises.cue: Lie on mat, press dumbbells up. Elbows touch floor gently each rep.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Overhead Press
exercises.cue: Stand tall, press overhead without arching back.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raises
exercises.cue: Slight bend in elbow. Raise to shoulder height. Controlled descent.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raises
exercises.cue: Alternate arms. Don't swing momentum.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Skullcrushers (Floor)
exercises.cue: Lie on mat, hinge only at elbows. Slow negative.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Overhead Press
exercises.cue: Clean to rack position. Press straight up. Keep core tight.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Push Press
exercises.cue: Slight leg drive to initiate press. Control the negative.

exercises.name: Barbell Floor Press
exercises.cue: Lie flat, unrack or clean bar. Press explosively. Elbows touch floor.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press (Standing)
exercises.cue: Clean bar to shoulders. Press overhead. Keep glutes and core braced.

exercises.name: Band Push-Ups
exercises.cue: Band across back, hands on band ends. Added resistance at lockout.

exercises.name: Band Lateral Raises
exercises.cue: Stand on band, raise hands to shoulder level. Constant tension.

exercises.name: Band Overhead Press
exercises.cue: Stand on band, press handles overhead. Full extension.

exercises.name: Strict Pull-Ups
exercises.cue: Drive elbows down to floor. Full hang at bottom. No kipping.

exercises.name: Chin-Ups
exercises.cue: Supinated grip. Chin over bar. Full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Negative Pull-Ups
exercises.cue: Jump to top, lower yourself over 5 seconds. Build strength for full reps.

exercises.name: Dead Hang
exercises.cue: Full passive hang. Decompresses spine. Builds grip.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Pull-Ups
exercises.cue: Wide grip targets outer lats for V-taper width.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.cue: Hinge at hips 45°. Pull bar to lower chest. Squeeze shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Barbell Bicep Curls
exercises.cue: Elbows pinned at sides. Squeeze at top. Slow negative.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.cue: One arm at a time on support. Pull to hip. Full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover (Floor)
exercises.cue: Lie flat, extend arms overhead with dumbbell. Stretch lats, pull back.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hammer Curls
exercises.cue: Neutral grip. Targets brachialis for arm thickness.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Row
exercises.cue: Hinge at hip, pull KB to hip. Squeeze scapula.

exercises.name: Kettlebell High Pull
exercises.cue: Explosive hip drive, pull to chin level. Control descent.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.cue: Arms straight in front, pull band apart. Squeeze shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Band Face Pulls
exercises.cue: Anchor band at head height. Pull to face, rotate externally.

exercises.name: Band Rows
exercises.cue: Anchor at chest height. Pull handles to ribcage. Squeeze back.

exercises.name: Band Bicep Curls
exercises.cue: Stand on band, curl handles. Constant tension throughout.

exercises.name: Inverted Rows (Bar Low)
exercises.cue: Set bar on low supports. Hang underneath and row body to bar.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Rows (Table/Bar)
exercises.cue: Use sturdy table edge. Pull chest to edge. Feet on floor.

exercises.name: Superman Hold
exercises.cue: Lie face down. Lift arms and legs off floor. Squeeze glutes and back.

exercises.name: Barbell Squat (Front or Zercher)
exercises.cue: Front squat or Zercher hold (bar in elbow crook). No rack needed.

exercises.name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.cue: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend. Feel hamstring stretch. Flat back.

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.cue: Bar over mid-foot. Drive through floor. Lock out hips at top.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.cue: Hold KB at chest. Squat deep. Elbows inside knees.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Single-Leg Deadlift
exercises.cue: Hinge on one leg. KB in opposite hand. Balance and stretch.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.cue: Rear foot elevated. Front knee tracks over toes. Deep stretch.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lunges
exercises.cue: Step forward, knee doesn't pass toes. Drive back to standing.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Sumo Squat
exercises.cue: Wide stance, hold dumbbell between legs. Inner thigh focus.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.cue: Full depth. Arms extended for balance. Drive through heels.

exercises.name: Jump Squats
exercises.cue: Squat down, explode up. Land softly. Plyometric power.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Calf Raises
exercises.cue: Stand on step edge. Full range of motion. Pause at top.

exercises.name: Wall Sit
exercises.cue: Back flat against wall. Thighs parallel to floor. Endure.

exercises.name: Band Squats
exercises.cue: Stand on band, handles at shoulders. Added resistance at top.

exercises.name: Band Lateral Walks
exercises.cue: Band around ankles. Squat position. Step laterally.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.cue: Hinge at hips. Power from glutes, not arms. Eye-level height.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollouts
exercises.cue: Don't let lower back sag. Keep glutes squeezed. Go as far as you can.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Kneeling Rollout
exercises.cue: From knees. Controlled extension and contraction. Beginner progression.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.cue: Elbows under shoulders. Body is straight line. Squeeze everything.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.cue: Stack feet. Hips up. Targets obliques.

exercises.name: Russian Twists
exercises.cue: Lean back 45°, feet off floor. Rotate TORSO, not just arms.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunches
exercises.cue: Opposite elbow to knee. Extend other leg fully. Controlled.

exercises.name: Leg Raises
exercises.cue: Lie flat. Raise straight legs to 90°. Lower slowly without touching floor.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raises
exercises.cue: Hang from bar. Raise legs to parallel or higher. No swinging.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raises
exercises.cue: Hang from bar, bring knees to chest. Control the swing.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Turkish Get-Up
exercises.cue: Full body stability exercise. Go slow. Eyes on the kettlebell.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Windmill
exercises.cue: KB overhead, hinge laterally. Stretch obliques and hamstrings.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.cue: Plank position. Drive knees to chest alternating. Keep hips level.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.cue: Lie on back. Extend opposite arm and leg. Keep lower back pinned to floor.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.cue: Chest to floor, explode up. Jump at top. Full intensity.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing HIIT
exercises.cue: Maximum intensity swings. Focus on hip snap.

exercises.name: Jump Rope (Imaginary)
exercises.cue: Bounce on balls of feet. Wrists do the rotation.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.cue: Drive knees above hip height. Pump arms. Sprint in place.

exercises.name: Squat Jumps
exercises.cue: Deep squat, explosive jump. Soft landing into next rep.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Clean & Press
exercises.cue: Clean KB to rack, press overhead. One fluid motion. Full body.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Thrusters
exercises.cue: Front squat into overhead press. One continuous movement.

exercises.name: Heavy Bag Straight Punches
exercises.cue: Jab-Cross combinations. Rotate hips. Stay on balls of feet.

exercises.name: Heavy Bag Combo: Jab-Cross-Hook
exercises.cue: 1-2-3 combo. Turn over the hook. Power from hips.

exercises.name: Heavy Bag Uppercuts
exercises.cue: Drop level, drive up through legs. Alternate hands.

exercises.name: Heavy Bag Body Shots
exercises.cue: Bend knees, aim for midsection of bag. Hooks and crosses.

exercises.name: Freestyle Bag Work
exercises.cue: Mix all punches. Add slips and rolls. Simulate fight.

exercises.name: Shadow Boxing
exercises.cue: No bag needed. Focus on technique, footwork, and breathing.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow Flow
exercises.cue: Alternate arching and rounding spine. Breathe with movement.

exercises.name: Downward Dog
exercises.cue: Push hips up and back. Heels toward floor. Spread fingers.

exercises.name: Couch Stretch
exercises.cue: Rear knee at wall, front foot forward. Opens tight hip flexors.

exercises.name: Pigeon Pose
exercises.cue: Front shin across mat, back leg extended. Deep hip opener.

exercises.name: Band Shoulder Dislocates
exercises.cue: Wide grip on band. Rotate arms overhead and behind. Gradually narrow grip.

exercises.name: World's Greatest Stretch
exercises.cue: Lunge, plant hand, rotate and reach up. Covers entire body.
